untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies a 5-period high/low channel (equivalent to Donchian channel) which is available, but the rule also references 'channel_width_multiple' parameter and 'sustained directional momentum' acceleration logic that cannot be precisely expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The core breakout concept is translatable using dc_upper/dc_lower, but secondary conditions around momentum acceleration and time-decay exit require indicators not in the allowed list.
translation_notes: Mapped 5-period high/low channel to Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower). Exit conditions interpreted as swing-level reversals using pivot support (s1) for longs and resistance (r1) for shorts. Time-based exit set to hold_days_max=5 per specification. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal accommodates both long and short breakouts. Volume filter parameter could not be applied due to missing volume momentum indicators.
